questions.question: How many seats are authorized on the board or committee, how many are currently filled, and how many vacancies exist?
questions.answer: The Conservation Advisory Council (CAC) of Pleasantville, NY currently lists 9 named members: Helen Meurer (Chair), Jennifer Frawley, Lisa Brown, Sophie Worley, Susan Todd, William Serlin, Michael Inglis, Tara Klein, and Philippe Yahia. The total number of authorized seats and any vacancies are not specified in the provided sources.
questions.gap: The website lists current members but does not state the total number of authorized seats or identify any vacancies. Full alignment with best practice would require explicitly stating authorized seat count and vacancy information.
